summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of CV-JD Matcher application. All backend APIs passed (25/25 tests). Frontend flows tested: Upload page with CV upload and JD input, Dashboard with Match and Rewrite functionality, Settings page with auth form, Applications page with sign-in requirement.

minor.issue: CV name displayed as 'Unknown' after PDF upload - PDF parsing may not extract name properly

issues: Skills score shows 0.0 and Education shows 0.0 - may indicate parser not extracting education/skills from PDF properly

action_items: OPTIONAL: Improve PDF parsing to better extract candidate name (currently shows 'Unknown' for Ankit_Kumar.pdf)
OPTIONAL: Review skills extraction from PDF - skills score showing 0.0 suggests skills may not be parsed correctly from PDF format
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API error handling is implemented properly
Uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly for API calls
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test JDs and uploaded test CVs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working: CV Upload (PDF/TXT), JD Add (text input), Match (returns scores and gaps), Rewrite (deterministic provider), Download tailored CV. Applications page requires authentication. Settings page has email/name login form. Navigation works across all pages.

flows_tested.cv_upload: PASS - PDF and TXT files upload successfully
flows_tested.jd_add: PASS - Text input method works, adds JD to list
flows_tested.match: PASS - Returns total_score, category_scores, hard_gaps, soft_gaps
flows_tested.rewrite: PASS - Deterministic provider generates tailored CV
flows_tested.dashboard: PASS - Shows CVs, JDs, Match All, Generate All buttons
flows_tested.settings: PASS - Has login form, API keys section
